channel.title: Blog on Alvaro Martin Ruiz | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Alvaro Martin Ruiz | Portfolio

item.title: Understanding Stochastic Calculus
item.description: This post will explore the fundamentals of Stochastic Calculus, starting from almost zero. It is intended to be explained in a way that is easy to understand for someone with a basic knowledge of probability and calculus. Howver, I truly recommend you to have a look at my post on Brownian Motion first, as it will help you to better understand the concepts in this post.

item.title: Understanding Brownian Motion
item.description:
This is my first blog post (I hope the first of many to come). In this post, I want to share with you my process of understanding Brownian Motion, starting from the very basics and going all the way to its insteresting properties and applications.

Overview

In this paper, I explore the fundamentals of Brownian motion, its mathematical properties, and how it can be modeled. The document serves as an in-depth dive into stochastic processes. I began writing it with almost no knowledge of stochastic calculus, and I’ve tried to reflect how my understanding evolved along the way. I hope you find it both easy to read and interesting.
